title: rubus adscitus subsp. macrothyrsus
intro: Rubus adscitus subsp. macrothyrsus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus adscitus plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus adscitus subsp. macrothyrsus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help to alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory issues. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including gastrointestinal problems and skin conditions.
